macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Supreme Court Strikes Down Trump's Sweeping Tariffs
items.summary: The US Supreme Court ruled against President Trump's use of emergency powers to impose broad import tariffs, leading to gains in US stocks on Friday with S&P 500 up 0.7% to 6,909.51, Dow up 0.5% to 49,625.97, and Nasdaq up 0.9% to 22,886.07. Trump vowed to pursue alternative tariff measures, creating ongoing market uncertainty.

items.title: US Futures Decline as Asian Markets Mixed Post-Tariff Ruling
items.summary: US futures fell with S&P 500 down 0.7%, Dow down 0.6%, and Nasdaq down 0.8%, while Asian indices showed mixed results: Kospi up 1.1%, Taiex up 1.4%, and ASX 200 down 0.4%. Markets react tentatively to tariff policy shifts and persistent uncertainties.

items.title: Akamai Technologies Shares Drop 14% on Weak Profit Forecast
items.summary: Akamai reported stronger-than-expected Q4 2025 results but issued a 2026 profit forecast below analyst estimates, causing shares to plunge 14.1%. This marked one of the sharpest losses on Wall Street amid broader market calm.

items.title: Oil Futures Mixed Amid US-Iran Tensions and Stockpile Draw
items.summary: Oil futures ended mixed with strong weekly gains due to concerns over potential US military action against Iran; US crude stockpiles fell 9 million barrels, far exceeding expectations of a 1.1 million barrel rise. Geopolitical risks support prices despite supply glut.

items.title: SCOTUS Tariff Ruling Weakens USD Outlook, No Major Central Bank Shifts Expected
items.summary: Supreme Court tariff decision threatens US fiscal credibility and drags on USD structurally; upcoming US data like ADP employment, consumer confidence, and PPI unlikely to alter Fed rate bets, with BOC also in no rush to hike. Trump's State of the Union on Tuesday in focus.

items.title: Indonesia's IHSG Eyes 8,400 Level on Tariff Relief and MSCI Updates
items.summary: IHSG poised for gains targeting 8,400 amid US Supreme Court tariff ruling easing trade risks, $6.1B NPI surplus, commodity strength in tin/nickel, and MSCI finalization improving transparency. Banking and mineral stocks like BMRI, BBRI, AMMN highlighted.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Plunges Below $65,000 Amid Tariff Uncertainty
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped over 5% to below $65,000, triggering $464 million in liquidations, following the U.S. Supreme Court's decision to strike down most of Trump's tariffs and new White House plans for 15% global tariffs. The cryptocurrency has lost nearly half its value since its October high of $126,210.

items.title: Bitcoin Breaches Key $65K Support, $45K Next?
items.summary: Bitcoin's fall below $65,000 has sparked fears of further declines to $45,000, driven by U.S. tariff uncertainties and bearish technicals, with analysts like DonAlt warning of a 'slow bleed' unless it closes above $71,000 daily.

items.title: Arthur Hayes Discloses Crypto Holdings: BTC, ETH, ZEC, HYPE
items.summary: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes revealed his cryptocurrency portfolio limited to Bitcoin, Ethereum, Zcash, and Hyperliquid's HYPE token, emphasizing core beliefs in macro liquidity, DeFi, privacy, and decentralized perpetuals amid inflation and geopolitical tensions.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Amazon Warns of AI-Assisted Cyber Breaches by Russian Threat Actor
items.summary: Amazon reports a Russian-speaking threat actor used AI to breach over 600 FortiGate firewalls across 55 countries. This highlights the growing malicious use of AI in cyberattacks.

items.title: Cisco and Sharon AI Launch Australia's First Cisco Secure AI Factory with NVIDIA
items.summary: Cisco partners with Sharon AI to introduce Australia's inaugural Cisco Secure AI Factory powered by NVIDIA, delivering secure and high-performance AI infrastructure.

items.title: DeepSeek V4 Challenges US AI Scaling with Efficient Engram Architecture
items.summary: DeepSeek V4 introduces the Engram architecture, enabling efficient memory separation that could run trillion-parameter models on consumer hardware, potentially reducing the need for massive data centers.

items.title: NASA Hosts AI/ML STIG Lecture on Recurrent Neural Networks
items.summary: NASA's AI/ML Science and Technology Interest Group schedules a virtual lecture on Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) by Daniel Muthukrishna from Harvard/MIT on February 23, 2026.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: PC Building Simulator 2 Launches on Consoles February 26
items.summary: PC Building Simulator 2 releases on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S on February 26, 2026, expanding the popular PC building simulation to consoles.

items.title: Over 30 Games Coming to Xbox February 23-27
items.summary: Xbox sees a packed week with releases including Golfing Over It with Alva Majo, Hunt the Night, Mole Cart Mining, No Sleep For Kaname Date, Sands of Aura, DUSK INDEX: GION, and Emoji Battlefield - Island Warfare.

items.title: Latest EDGE Magazine Reviews: Nioh 3 Scores 8/10
items.summary: EDGE magazine reviews Nioh 3 (8/10) as a solid sequel with slick production, alongside Romeo Is A Dead Man (7), 2XKO (7), and Highguard (5).

items.title: Romeo Is a Dead Man Review Highlights Suda51 Chaos
items.summary: Grasshopper Manufacture's Romeo Is a Dead Man receives mixed praise for inventive chaos but criticism for stiff combat and PS5 performance issues.

items.title: Worldwide Tic Tac Toe Championship Announced
items.summary: A new absurd esports event, the Worldwide Tic Tac Toe Championship, launches led by self-declared supervillain King Supernuts.

items.title: Major Pokémon Presents Showcase Scheduled for Pokémon Day
items.summary: The Pokémon Company announces a huge Pokémon Presents for the franchise's 30th anniversary and annual Pokémon Day.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: NextFin Asia Launches Dedicated Fund for Catapult: Inclusion SE Asia Program
items.summary: NextFin Asia has introduced a new dedicated fund to expand the Catapult: Inclusion SE Asia Program, aiming to scale inclusive finance fintechs across ASEAN countries. The initiative focuses on enhancing financial inclusion through technology in Southeast Asia.
